project.title: VEVO-EMO+: Any-to-Any Expressive Voice Conversion
project.subtitle: Demo page with curated samples from a balanced test subset.
project.abstract: We present VEVO-EMO+, an any-to-any expressive voice conversion system. This page provides representative source-to-target emotion transfer examples with side-by-side comparisons between baseline and proposed outputs.

figure_caption: Overview of VEVO-EMO+ training and inference.
subset_note: Subset setting: 4 speakers, cross-emotion directions only, 4 candidate samples per speaker-direction (320 total candidates). The rows below are demo picks.

sections.title: Seen to Seen
sections.description: Source and target speakers are both seen during training.
